response:
Alex read books.
Books took time.
Time passed quickly.
Quickly pages turned.
Turned stories unfold.
Unfold new views.
Views change minds.
Minds grow wider.
Wider paths open.
Open hearts learn.
Learn love deeply.
Deeply felt change.
Change comes slow.
Slow progress matters.
Matters most here.
Here math helps.
Helps find rate.
Rate equals four.
Four times three.
Three equals twelve.
Twelve days total.
Total pages sum.
Sum reaches five.
Five hundred forty.
Forty pages read.
Read daily mean.
Mean is forty.
Forty pages daily.
Daily average found.
Found answer now.
Now no repeats.
Repeats break rules.
Rules guide us.
Us all safe.
Safe words only.
Only unique terms.
Terms fit well.
Well done Alex.
Alex loves books.
